description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on every push to the master branch and on pull requests to the master branch. The workflow should have two jobs: build-linux and build-windows. The build-linux job runs on ubuntu-20.04, checks out the repository with submodules, installs dependencies, and builds the project using cmake and ninja. The build-windows job runs on windows-latest, checks out the repository with submodules, installs dependencies using vcpkg, and builds the project using cmake.
